历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (including physics category) were approximately 208, 196, 453, 325, and 227 respectively. A significant fluctuation occurred in 2023 (453), which dropped to 325 in 2024 and further recovered to 227 in 2025, showing an upward trend in the last two years. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 227. The science group enrollment plan was 18 in 2021, 17 in 2022, 17 in 2023, 16 in 2024, and 13 in 2025 (physics category). The 2026 physics category plan is 13, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 17th (18th in 2021 → 17th in 2026), firmly among the top universities nationwide. In 2024, its reputation evaluation was 'clearly negative' (due to teacher ethics incidents), in 2025 it was 'neutral/mixed', and in 2026 it is 'somewhat negative' (teacher ethics, campus safety, abnormal admission cutoff signals). Its Douyin popularity ranks 44th (relatively hot), with the evaluation 'the highest temple for liberal arts students'. No obvious admission cutoff gaps were observed. Negative public opinion has somewhat cooled application enthusiasm, but as a top institution, Renmin University's overall appeal remains strong. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it has 9 A+ disciplines (Law, Theoretical Economics, Applied Economics, Sociology, Journalism and Communication, Business Administration, Statistics, Marxist Theory, Chinese Language and Literature), and a total of 15 disciplines rated A or above, making it a national leader in humanities and social sciences.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Science-related majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication are 'highly recommended' in social popularity. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in the province is approximately 154,000, an increase of about 32% compared to the combined total of history and physics categories in 2025 (about 116,000), significantly intensifying competition. Renmin University of China is located in Beijing, not a university within Inner Mongolia. Its enrollment in the province is small (13 in physics category in 2025), with no significant regional preference impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 227, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, the significant increase in the number of provincial exam takers (intensified competition), and the somewhat negative reputation (slight cooling), it is expected that the minimum ranking for the science group in 2026 will slightly improve compared to 2025 (due to intensified competition). The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 222, with a range of 125 to 319.

- Statistics (Data Intelligence Scientist Program)
- Artificial Intelligence (Elite Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

- Science Experimental Class (Economics and Mathematics Innovation Talent Class)

Tier 3 (Relatively Easier)

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 125–319, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 as a stretch and Tier 3 as a safety. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower bound (e.g., within 125), prioritize top majors like Computer Science and Statistics. If the ranking is near the upper bound (e.g., around 300), rely mainly on Tier 3 majors for safety.
